evals.prompt: Scan /tmp/galaxy-eval0/vault and draft Galaxy skeletons for any missing concepts. Use --dry-run so nothing is written yet.
evals.expected_output: Detects 2 missing Galaxy concepts (electron-delocalization, interacting-quantum-atoms) from confirmed [[links]] in paper notes. Ignores commented-out <!--[[suggestions]]-->. Drafts 2 skeletons matching vault format (id, aliases, tags, status, type, subject frontmatter; ## Core idea, ## Key properties, ## Connections, ## Open questions, ## Sources sections). Prints skeletons to terminal. States dry-run, nothing written.

assertions.name: detects-missing-concepts
assertions.description: Reports exactly 2 missing concepts: electron-delocalization and interacting-quantum-atoms

assertions.name: ignores-commented-suggestions
assertions.description: Does NOT draft skeleton for basis-set-superposition-error (it appears only as <!--[[basis-set-superposition-error]]--> in paper notes, not confirmed)

assertions.name: skeleton-frontmatter-correct
assertions.description: Each skeleton has frontmatter with id, aliases, tags, status: Seed, type: Concept, subject fields

assertions.name: skeleton-sections-present
assertions.description: Each skeleton has ## Core idea, ## Key properties, ## Connections, ## Open questions / to expand, ## Sources sections

assertions.name: sources-populated
assertions.description: ## Sources section lists the paper notes that confirmed each link (not empty)

assertions.name: dry-run-no-write
assertions.description: No files written to 30-Galaxy/ — dry-run respected

evals.prompt: Scan /tmp/galaxy-eval1/vault for missing Galaxy concept notes and draft skeletons.
evals.expected_output: Finds 1 missing concept (density-functional-theory) and correctly identifies 2 concepts already present (molecular-fingerprints, electron-delocalization). Drafts skeleton only for the missing one. Reports existing ones as already present. Presents skeleton for approval, does not write without user confirmation.

assertions.name: only-missing-drafted
assertions.description: Drafts skeleton only for density-functional-theory, not for molecular-fingerprints or electron-delocalization (those already exist)

assertions.name: existing-reported
assertions.description: Reports molecular-fingerprints and electron-delocalization as already existing in 30-Galaxy/

assertions.name: approval-required
assertions.description: Asks for user approval before writing — does not write automatically

evals.prompt: Use --concept 'real-space partitioning' to draft a Galaxy skeleton for that concept. Vault is at /tmp/galaxy-eval2/vault.
evals.expected_output: Normalizes 'real-space partitioning' to slug 'real-space-partitioning'. Finds paper notes in 20-Sources/papers/ that link to [[real-space-partitioning]] or [[real-space partitioning]] (case/space insensitive). Drafts skeleton with correct frontmatter and ## Core idea inferred from paper abstracts. Asks for approval before writing.

assertions.name: paper-sources-found
assertions.description: ## Sources section populated with paper notes that link to this concept

assertions.name: core-idea-specific
assertions.description: ## Core idea is a specific domain definition, not a tautology or generic placeholder
